name: backpack-viewer
description: Web-based graph visualizer for backpack-ontology — Canvas 2D, force-directed layout, live reload
author: Noah Irzinger

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.extensions.json && cp src/style.css dist/ && node scripts/build-extensions.js && node scripts/bundle-extensions.js && vite build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags
